description_long: This is a rectangular filing cabinet with a light wood top and a white painted body, featuring a classic, vintage-inspired design. The front face is organized into three rows and four columns of drawers, totaling twelve, each with a small round metal pull and a rectangular label holder above it. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel divided into four vertical sections for structural support. The wood top is smooth and slightly overhangs the body, providing a sturdy surface for placing items. The base is solid and slightly raised, giving the cabinet a stable stance. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for organizing documents or small items in a professional or archival setting.
description: A vintage-style white filing cabinet with a light wood top, twelve drawers, and metal pulls with label holders. The design is sturdy and functional, ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing twelve drawers, each with a metal pull and label holder, and a smooth wood top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain white panel and the overhanging wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view with four vertical white panels and no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain white panel and wood top.
